hooks.description: Deterministic enforcement hooks for the knowledge-skills system. These are proposed hooks; the human can review and enable them in their Claude Code configuration.

skillWriteGate.description: Block Write/Edit on **/skills/**/SKILL.md unless a corresponding validation artifact exists for that skill.

securityGuardrail.description: Block reads of .env/secrets and dangerous Bash commands.

bootstrapGate.description: Block turn termination until .agents/skills/.bootstrap-state.json shows every phase done: true and gate_passed: true.
